texto: If you do not question everything, you may never find the true answer, you will only find the answer everyone wants to believe.That it called being another sheep in the herd, that is why the people who question things are considered black sheep and the people who give you the answers, Wolves
explicacao: Citação de Theodore Coldiron sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “If you do not question everything, you may never find the true answer, you will only find the ans…” articula fe, government, philosophy em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como philosophy e religion.
